textByHash.006110f51380df96f02cad9a7df03ffe8781df64: You're that adventurer the family asked to help get those weird cultists who keep breaking in, right?
textByHash.10312e12812ef6d03a56eded5f5c20b082040115: Sorry, I shouldn't be talking to you about it.
textByHash.126fa4f52168220a7a1420bae6ebf71d4b25b59a: Oh man... I hope I don't lose my job over this... but HOW? How did they do it? And why would the villain want to kill poor Scruffy anyway? He was such a good dog...
textByHash.1655b6be17d608ace8441e127f65f133c14e7741: This poor family. I don't know how much more they can take.
textByHash.22736e6620d12c0dc8860bb7b88ac32276812e7c: I still don't believe it. This poor family. I don't know how much more they can take.
textByHash.2e594b017b4c9bd661bc7092d556f1151bc69453: Yes... this sudden cold feeling. I was right next to the warm stove, so it was very odd. I thought it was just some wind... but maybe...
textByHash.31de69f3c98e3d25dc1b7ad73aa48684744927d5: Hello there. Caught any of those weird cultists yet?
textByHash.3d980c348e754025d811c191af0a64b5a69c0782: Well... I thought I saw this shadow in the room, just for a moment. Surely it was just a trick of the light though...
textByHash.47c51bb6abda444f8ef2054c36b03b503316af82: I was here in the kitchen. Sir Ceril is an early riser, and he likes a good breakfast as soon as he wakes up.
textByHash.4dc1d2e3303d759c358f2697319255f1fc39606c: I... just CAN'T understand it! How? HOW could someone poison my delicious food without me even noticing??? I... I just don't understand!
textByHash.6610a8d2018b029c2592006993887d177f5b90d9: Things aren't the same here now that Sir Ceril is gone.
textByHash.672a775647bc81d4a9931de7fc6582c1e192fbac: Sorry, can't stop to chat! You would be amazed at how many meals this family gets through daily!
textByHash.7639564eea8efb8ac510b18b91b975ed4754237e: Oi - I don't want people messing around with my range!
textByHash.82b218472f287398bbc897b8a79eb851d1c8a6a2: Well... no... not really. I guess there was the cold...
textByHash.863845688c189f7ed5227038ff5d39edc13b255f: Oh man... I hope I don't lose my job over this... but how? How did they do it? And why would they want to kill poor Scruffy anyway? He was such a good dog...
textByHash.8b063f13adf4a9b3cd90c719bfdf0ae057cb681e: I just don't understand it! How? How could someone poison my delicious food without me even noticing? I... I just don't get it!
textByHash.966942fba99cc4134adbb7a7c8ce46de370670cd: Hello there. Caught any of those weird thieves yet?
textByHash.98411cccc1630b216035dc45a6789ced1d7d61c5: You're that adventurer the family asked to help deal with those weird cultists, right?
textByHash.a0cfe713dee30cdb14ed778273cfca93d2102269: Those animals... how could they do that to poor Scruffy? What kind of lowlife would do that???
textByHash.a104a8689ec7e3a65b5625ee487a6b344583ecd0: I don't know if I should be answering any questions. You should probably check with the guard first.
textByHash.a2ece0cf235ec496306f7fd57faa98d75bdf3374: There was this sudden cold feeling and when I turned around, I thought I saw a shadow. Surely it was just a trick of the light...
textByHash.a31782f72e9328db904dde05a4310486c873b312: But I already spoke to the authorities earlier.
textByHash.d5ec95414f53dc1018812bdff9892598dd68140e: Oh, hello there. Sorry, but I can't really talk right now. Things haven't been great here recently, and I have a lot of work to do.
textByHash.ea2552673ea1400973595b421e76fc8cb538a83d: Well hello there, adventurer! Are we fit and well?
